name: Guidance
description: Programs LLM output with interleaved generation, control flow, and constraints — regex, grammars, and tool calls in one Python paradigm for faster, structured results. 21k+ GitHub stars, MIT-licensed.

skills.name: Interleaved Generation
skills.description: Mixes prompting, generation, and program logic in one flow so you steer the model step by step.

skills.name: Constraint Enforcement
skills.description: Restricts output with regex and context-free grammars to guarantee well-formed, structured results.

skills.name: Token Efficiency
skills.description: Reuses key-value caches and avoids redundant tokens to cut latency and cost on structured prompts.
